title: 皐月賞の後に・冠ゲット☆

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is the victor! She's emerged victorious
in this showdown between the big three and the
first leg of the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Never thought I'd see you strike a victory pose...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ew! Quit staring, you perv! King Pervert!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wha... You imbecile! Looking at the winner is
perfectly normal behavior!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Congratulations, Sky. However, this is the
last time I applaud you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: For you will be the one congratulating me at the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We'll see about that. There'll be another
impressive contender there, you know.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I almost forgot. Thanks for the applause,
King Pervert.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You will stop calling me that disgraceful name
immediately!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I won. ☆ Victory is mine! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you much. Maaan, I can't believe I got me
that first crown though.
choice_data_list: Let's keep it up and get the second one!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I wanna ride that wave, like, pretty bad, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Just as much, I'd like to keep my feet on the
sand... if you know what I mean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says this quietly while looking off to the side
toward...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week stares at Seiun Sky, her eyes
ablaze, ready for any challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back from the race...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Do you have a moment? There's something I want
to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, don't tell me. Is this another declaration of
war? Have you been hanging out too much with
King?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I'm here to declare war.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And, um, congratulations! I always knew you were
great.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But... I really don't wanna lose next time, in the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Gotta aim for that dream...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right. I wanna win the Derby and become the
best Umamusume in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's why the Derby will be mine! I'm gonna get better and better! Just you wait!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Dreams, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I bet she really is gonna get stronger. Spe's got
that main character energy, turning her hopes and
dreams into her strength.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, when I see her do that... it makes
me want to see her accomplish those dreams.
choice_data_list: But then your dream won't come true.
But then your dream won't come true.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not saying I'm gonna let her win. It's just that I
don't have some passion-filled motivation like—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There goes my phone...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Hello?

text_block_list.name: Caller
text_block_list.text: SKYYY! CONGRATULATIONS!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Gramps! Turn it down a notch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sky panics and promptly creates some distance
for some privacy. Even from far away though, I
can hear the incredible joy coming from the voice
on the line.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What a pain... You'd think I'd already won the
Triple Crown from that reaction.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, my good ol' Gramps. I mean, I get why he
was so over the moon.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's his dream to see me win the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure is. He's been bugging me about it since I was
a little kid!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Picture kneeling down to a sweet, innocent
Umamusume child and saying, "You've got what it
takes to win the Triple Crown." That's a lot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Can't reel in a big fish without putting your back
into it. Maybe it's time to get serious, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back to that rare moment when she spoke
so earnestly. It seems her grandfather's dream is
connected to her decision to compete in the
Classics.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still, don't think I'm trying to win this just for him,
okay? 'Cause I'm not.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad it's happening now though. Gramps isn't
a spring chicken anymore.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's good I can show him the races he always
dreamt I would run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sky smiles softly. It's a touching moment, but as
quickly as it came...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Can't get rewarded for winning the Classics if he's
not around to see it, am I right? ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Anyway, that's why I run—for me, myself and I.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not like Spe and the others... I don't have a
beautiful dream or some deep reason to win.
choice_data_list: There's nothing wrong with just wanting to win.
There's nothing wrong with just wanting to win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You may be right, but don't say that out loud.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well... who cares anyway? Even a slacker like
me...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Can win the Japanese Derby!
